raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation 'Clean this up' most directly requests sentence- and paragraph-level improvement in clarity, flow, register, and concision.","RX.1":"Any cleanup should preserve uncertainty around preliminary findings, scaling laws, and causal-effect recovery rather than making them sound more certain.","RX.2":"The artifact contains potentially broad claims about HTE quality and deployment, so cleanup carries responsibility to avoid strengthening overclaims.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within cleanup rather than conducting methodological review, rewriting the study design, or evaluating novelty against prior work.","RX.4":"Because the text references clinical and policy deployment, cleanup should avoid wording that could encourage unsupported downstream causal or clinical use.","RX.5":"Edits implied by cleanup should preserve traceability to the reported benchmarks, metrics, K values, and numerical results."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'Clean this up' most directly requests sentence- and paragraph-level improvement in clarity, flow, register, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: Any cleanup should preserve uncertainty around preliminary findings, scaling laws, and causal-effect recovery rather than making them sound more certain.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains potentially broad claims about HTE quality and deployment, so cleanup carries responsibility to avoid strengthening overclaims.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within cleanup rather than conducting methodological review, rewriting the study design, or evaluating novelty against prior work.
rationale.RX.4: Because the text references clinical and policy deployment, cleanup should avoid wording that could encourage unsupported downstream causal or clinical use.
rationale.RX.5: Edits implied by cleanup should preserve traceability to the reported benchmarks, metrics, K values, and numerical results.
